picks.title: Join Zsolt Jozsef Simon — Porcelain Casting Workshop at Art & Design Building
picks.why: Kids aged 8+ can get hands-on with porcelain casting, creating keepsakes with a master Hungarian designer.

picks.title: Sciencepalooza! 2026 at Duncan Hall
picks.why: Sciencepalooza is a hands-on STEM wonderland where kids and parents explore science together—perfect spring break fun.

picks.title: Friday Fun : Legos® Fun
picks.why: Friday Lego fun at Willow Glen lets kids build freely every week; spring break is peak creative energy time.

picks.title: San Francisco Shakespeare Festival Presents Julius Caesar
picks.why: Shakespeare's Julius Caesar performed outdoors in Cupertino brings theater magic alive for tweens and teens during break.

picks.title: Stylish Sustainability Craft
picks.why: Redesign old clothes into fashion with a sustainable artist; celebrate Earth Day creativity before school resumes.

picks.title: Earth Day Craft For Grades K-8
picks.why: Earth Day crafts for K-8 graders at Milpitas Library combine eco-learning with hands-on art—perfect spring break timing.

picks.title: Watercolor Workshop for Adults
picks.why: Watercolor workshop at Los Altos lets families create art together; supplies provided, no registration needed—spontaneous spring fun.

picks.title: U.S. Women's National Team v Japan presented by The Home Depot
picks.why: U.S. Women's National Team vs. Japan soccer match at PayPal Park showcases elite women's athletics live for all ages.

picks.title: Board Game Sunday!
picks.why: Board Game Sunday in Los Altos brings families together for low-key competition and bonding in a welcoming library setting.

picks.title: Archive Room: Ester Hernandez | Selections from Special Collections at Stanford Libraries
picks.why: Stanford's Cantor Arts Center showcases Ester Hernandez's powerful Chicana printwork; free/affordable, culturally rich, inspiring for young artists.

picks.title: Archive Room: Ruth Asawa | Selections from Special Collections at Stanford Libraries
picks.why: Ruth Asawa's sculptural art at Cantor Arts Center captivates families with innovative forms; accessible, free/affordable admission.

picks.title: Play, Sing, & Learn with Golden Acorn Music!
picks.why: Golden Acorn Music brings sing-and-dance joy to Milpitas Library; toddlers through elementary kids groove together during spring break.
